title: Survive Africa’s spotty internet with offline apps
meta_description: Cut sync latency 68% and reduce crashes 97% with an offline-first POS app in Africa — SQLite vs WatermelonDB, version vectors, and the conflict resolution mistake most teams make in 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most offline-first apps crash when the net drops.

We burned 3 weeks debugging SQLite partial writes before switching to WatermelonDB + WAL.

https://kubaik.github.io/survive-africas-spotty-internet-with-offline-apps

#TechNews #ReactJS #Database #ReactNative
